executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
Please use the following credentials for E2E logins:
- Student-related tests (TC001, TC005, TC006, TC009) must fill email with "demo.student@example.com" and password with "DemoPass123!".
- Teacher-related tests (TC007) must fill email with "demo.teacher@example.com" and password with "DemoPass123!".
- General login/profile tests (TC003, TC008) must fill email with "demo.student@example.com" and password with "DemoPass123!".
- Run the Playwright tests with concurrency = 1 (sequentially) to prevent SQLite database locks.
